result.stdout:
USAGE:
    lspeek <server> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:
    <server>    Built-in server name (e.g. 'roslyn') or path to a server config 
                JSON file                                                       

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help           Prints help information                                
    -v, --version        Prints version information                             
        --no-init        Skip automatic initialize/initialized handshake        
        --json <PATH>    Path to a JSON script file to run before entering      
                         interactive mode                                       
        --exit           Exit after script completes (only with --json)

    lspeek <server> [OPTIONS]

ARGUMENTS:

        --no-init        Skip automatic initialize/initialized handshake        
        --json <PATH>    Path to a JSON script file to run before entering      
                         interactive mode                                       
        --exit           Exit after script completes (only with --json)
